title: Implement assignment status update endpoints
description: Add backend support for manager assignment lifecycle actions from assignment detail, including complete, reassign, and cancel endpoints or action handlers with deterministic validation, guardrails, and API test coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment status update actions enforce manager/admin-only role guardrails
Complete, reassign, and cancel flows return deterministic contract metadata and mutation payloads
Validation, not-found, forbidden, unauthorized, and conflict semantics are covered in API tests
